[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010010100 3
1 101001001 4
2 111100111 7
3 111111011 8
4 111111110 8
5 001110101 5
6 111111111 a
7 110100111 6
